summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Command Center Hub page. All core functionality works correctly including login flow, hub page layout, module cards, navigation, and logout. Found one minor styling bug with IN DEV cards opacity.

ui_bugs.issue: IN DEV cards (Service Tickets, Survival Path) should have opacity 0.6 but show opacity 1. Framer Motion animate={{ opacity: 1 }} overrides the inline style opacity: isLive ? 1 : 0.6
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} to animate={{ opacity: isLive ? 1 : 0.6, y: 0 }} or remove opacity from animation

passed_tests: Login flow: Heart click → EKG animation (5 sec) → Login form appears
Login with credentials Lew/Lew123 → redirects to /hub
Command Center Hub page renders with correct layout
Header shows Cardiac Solutions branding, SYSTEM ONLINE status, OPERATOR: LEW badge
Title section shows SELECT MODULE, COMMAND CENTER HUB with CENTER in red
AVAILABLE MODULES label displayed
5 module cards rendered with correct data-testid attributes
Module 1 (Daily Report): LIVE badge, MODULE #1, correct icon and description
Module 2 (Notifications): LIVE badge, MODULE #2, red badge count 16
Module 3 (Service Tickets): IN DEV badge, MODULE #3, cursor: not-allowed
Module 4 (Survival Path): IN DEV badge, MODULE #4, cursor: not-allowed
Module 5 (Dashboard): LIVE badge, MODULE #5, correct description
Dashboard card click navigates to /dashboard
Dashboard page renders correctly with all panels
IN DEV cards (Service Tickets, Survival Path) do NOT navigate - stay on /hub
Daily Report card (LIVE, no route) redirects back to /hub via catch-all
Notifications card (LIVE, no route) redirects back to /hub via catch-all
Footer shows copyright 2026, V2.1.0
Footer has DOCUMENTATION, SUPPORT, LOGOUT buttons
LOGOUT button logs out and returns to login page
Direct URL /hub without auth redirects to login page
After login, URL is /hub not /dashboard
action_items: Fix IN DEV cards opacity: Framer Motion animation overrides inline style. Change animate={{ opacity: 1 }} to animate={{ opacity: isLive ? 1 : 0.6 }} in ModuleCard component (line 77 of CommandCenterHub.jsx)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: IN DEV cards opacity animation conflict - Framer Motion animate prop overrides inline style opacity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center Hub page fully functional. Login flow works with 5-second EKG animation. All 5 module cards display correctly. Dashboard navigation works. IN DEV cards correctly prevent navigation. Only issue is IN DEV cards opacity not showing 0.6 due to Framer Motion animation override.
mocked_api_note: Backend AED data is all mocked (hardcoded in server.py). No real database.
